name: worktree-merge-consensus
description: Coordinate and visibly monitor reviewed integration across two existing Codex task worktrees.

interface.shortDescription: Integrate two Codex worktrees with visible review progress.
interface.longDescription: Launch and visibly monitor a persistent, reviewed integration run between two existing Codex tasks while preserving both source branches.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start and monitor a reviewed integration between two existing Codex tasks.
